title: uncaria ovata
intro: Uncaria ovata, also known as Kunlun or Kunlun Bark, is a type of climbing vine native to the Himalayan regions. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Uncaria ovata include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and improving cardiovascular health. Uncaria ovata is typically prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
